column3: In celebration and calculation do we bring a Heavensturn gift, from the Far East to Eorzea. Long may we be of good blood!
Has m'lady perhaps misplaced the gift she was given, that which the giver and the gifted alike call the uma kabuto?
You are a woman fearless and clueless to lose an item of such import! I shall give you another, but misplace it not again.
